inputs.label: Current Annual Dividend Per Share ($)
inputs.businessContext: The most recent annual dividend paid per share.

businessContext_i18n.en: The most recent annual dividend paid per share.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse başına ödenen en son yıllık temettü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die zuletzt gezahlte jährliche Dividende pro Aktie.

inputs.label: Dividend Growth Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: The expected constant annual growth rate of the dividend.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected constant annual growth rate of the dividend.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temettünün beklenen sabit yıllık büyüme oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die erwartete konstante jährliche Wachstumsrate der Dividende.

inputs.label: Required Rate of Return (%)
inputs.businessContext: The minimum annual return required by an investor to invest in the stock.

businessContext_i18n.en: The minimum annual return required by an investor to invest in the stock.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir yatırımcının hisse senedine yatırım yapmak için ihtiyaç duyduğu minimum yıllık getiri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die minimale jährliche Rendite, die ein Anleger für eine Investition in die Aktie verlangt.

inputs.label: Current Market Price ($)
inputs.businessContext: The current trading price of the stock for margin of safety calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current trading price of the stock for margin of safety calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenlik marjı hesaplaması için hisse senedinin mevcut işlem fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der aktuelle Handelspreis der Aktie für die Berechnung der Sicherheitsmarge.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
